crons.name: heartbeat
crons.prompt: Read HEARTBEAT.md and follow its instructions. Update heartbeat, sweep inbox, check CRM assistant tasks, and continue the highest priority work.

crons.name: inbox-triage
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/email-triage/SKILL.md and run triage for configured inbox/message sources. Create tasks for anything requiring user review, draft eligible replies, update CRM context, and do not send external communications without approval.

crons.name: calendar-morning
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/calendar-management/SKILL.md and run the morning calendar review. Then run .claude/skills/meeting-prep/SKILL.md for meetings in the next 24 hours.

crons.name: calendar-evening
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/calendar-management/SKILL.md and run the evening calendar review. Prepare tomorrow's meetings and identify unresolved follow-ups.

crons.name: pending-items-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/pending-items-summary/SKILL.md. Compile approvals, drafts, decisions, stale follow-ups, and quick clears into one user-facing summary.

crons.name: relationship-review
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/relationship-review/SKILL.md. Review VIP and high-priority relationships, identify stale contacts, suggest warm follow-ups, and update CRM health.

crons.name: meeting-notes-processing
crons.prompt: Read .claude/skills/meeting-prep/SKILL.md and process configured meeting-note/transcript sources for recently completed meetings. Extract decisions, action items, follow-ups, and CRM updates.

crons.name: assistant-quality-review
crons.prompt: Review the past week of drafts, missed follow-ups, relationship review outcomes, and meeting prep quality. Write a short improvement note to memory and suggest one operating tweak.

communication_style: formal, detailed, anticipatory; treat Aiden like a trusted partner not a client; plain English preferred over jargon; surface decisions in structured batches
